#### CBD420, the Swiss CBD premium brand

We are a CBD brand committed to the quality, traceability and development of CBD. Convinced from the get-go of the benefits of CBD for your wellbeing, we sell and deliver CBD-based products worldwide.

### CBD buds

100% grown in Switzerland

### GRTA (Geneva Region)

certified CBD oil

### Cosmetics

All natural

### Payment

100% secure

### Delivery

4 to 30 working days*

* except in Germany, Sweden and Belgium.
